name: Jackfrost
author: Poki
description: Jackfrost is a frosty action-platformer where you bring the chill! Take control of Jackfrost and freeze every platform by walking over them. Jump on enemies to turn them into icy paths, but be quick—ice melts! Climb ladders, outmanoeuvre obstacles, and freeze your way through each level. Can you turn the whole world into a winter wonderland? How to play Jackfrost? Use the arrow keys or WASD to move around! Who created Jackfrost? Jackfrost was created by Nitrome. Play their other games on Poki: Bad Ice-Cream , Double Edged and Bad Ice-Cream 3 ! How can I play Jackfrost for free? You can play Jackfrost for free on Poki.
